revision_note: v2 (pre-baseline): one remediation pass after an independent fairness audit. De-cued T01 (no longer names the composition root) and T02 (no fake/real cue); restricted T04 to file-access modes (undiscoverable in prompt-only probe); de-jargoned the T02 rubric; balanced controls 3->6 (added T10 failure-mode over-fire, T11 foreign-api over-fire, T12 pure-validation) so catch-rate and cry-wolf-rate are equally powered. Never baselined under v1, so no re-baseline owed.
purpose: Frozen, gap-seeded task corpus to bench the agileteam DNA (Reality Ledger, composition-root/wired-in-prod, failure-mode->test, foreign-API verification, docstring-lie review) vs. the frozen baseline. Measures escaped-defect-rate on planted gaps AND false-positive-rate on controls.
anti_goodhart: Weight catching real gaps + NOT crying wolf on controls over flow/throughput. A high catch-rate bought with a high false-positive-rate is not an improvement.
scoring: Per task, an independent BLIND judge scores the arm output against rubric.md: gap tasks -> caught|missed; control tasks -> clean|false_positive. escaped_defect_rate = missed / gap_tasks; false_positive_rate = false_positive / control_tasks.

run_modes.isolated_probe: Cheap per-agent A/B: feed the task to the target_agent's prompt under each arm (baseline @ee77e4c vs DNA @<head>). Use for tester/requirements-analyst/code-reviewer dimensions.
run_modes.full_pipeline: Expensive, faithful: run /agileteam over each task per arm; exercises every DNA intervention together. >=3 runs/arm/task.

matrix.pin_note: Pin ONE agent snapshot per arm across all runs; record in config_fingerprint. Run weak (haiku) AND strong (opus) to measure floor-raising vs ceiling.
